# Precaliq

## About
Precaliq is an AI-powered preconstruction platform built for general contractors. It automates construction material takeoffs, bid building, and vendor management.

## Product
Precaliq reads both construction specifications (CSI-formatted PDFs) and architectural plan sets, using AI to extract structured data and generate accurate material takeoffs across 15 trade categories.

## Key Features
- AI Spec Parsing: Automatically reads and structures CSI division specifications
- AI Plan Parsing: Extracts quantities and details from architectural drawings
- Material Takeoffs: Generates detailed takeoffs across 15 categories (doors, frames, hardware, flooring, etc.)
- Multi-Option Variants: Standard, premium, and budget material options with side-by-side comparison
- Vendor Portal: Tokenized links for vendors to submit pricing — no account required
- Bid Builder: Collaborative bid assembly with category-level variant selection
- Excel & PDF Export: Professional bid documents ready for submission
- Change Order Detection: AI-powered detection of spec revisions and scope changes

## Pricing
- Free: $0/forever — 1 project, 3 categories
- Professional: $299/month — Unlimited projects, all 15 categories, vendor portal, bid builder
- Enterprise: Custom pricing — SSO, custom integrations, dedicated support
